response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep Python/TypeScript exposure, and notable open-source contributions including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct cloud AI system design, vector databases, or RAG architectures — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven track record in building scalable cloud-native systems (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Strong technical leadership through workshops, open-source projects, and mentoring
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI/ML systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
Limited documentation of cloud-based GenAI deployment or LLM optimization work
